title: We Won't Kill Each Other with Guns
original_title: Nosaltres no ens matarem amb pistoles
overview: The reunion of a group of friends after years without seeing each other will bring out the alcoholic memory of old loves and wounds, and will push them to travel to a past that they fear and long for.
